Package reciprocal.geometry

Class BigRectangle

java.lang.Object
reciprocal.geometry.AbstractRectangle<BigDecimal,BigRectangle>
reciprocal.geometry.BigRectangle
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public final class BigRectangle extends AbstractRectangle<BigDecimal,BigRectangle>
Immutable implementation of a rectangle which uses Double as type for its length and width
